name: Connectors Panel & API
features: GET /api/connectors returns 8 connectors with env-var-derived status
ConnectorsPanel component with SVG icons for GitHub/Slack
Lucide fallback icons for database, redis, blob, server, bot, plug
Status indicators: green check (connected), amber check (configured), gray X (disconnected)
Collapsed sidebar view shows connected count
Expanded view shows full connector list with name, details, status
Integration with existing FileSystemBrowser (connectors section uses /api/tools endpoint)
lint_errors_fixed: noConstantCondition: removed || true from neptune_v2 status check
useBlockStatements: added braces to if (!cancelled) setLoading(false)
